facade_description: 8B Oxford St presents a multi-residential facade within the Kensington Market HCD. The street elevation spans roughly 5.2 metres across 1 storeys and is capped by a gable, consistent with its multi-residential typology. The facade reads primarily as other, laid in running bond with light grey mortar joints. The visible opening pattern is organized as 2 window bays from lower to upper levels, using double-hung sash windows, and 1 principal entrance. HCD note: The property has value as a rare and early example of a walk-up apartment building in Kensington Market that reflects vernacular interpretations of Edwardian and early-twentieth-century architectural styles. Through its construction date and typology, the property is directly associated with the Dis
